findings.summary: Required document 'police_report' for claim type 'auto_collision' is not present in the file.
Required document 'photos' for claim type 'auto_collision' is not present in the file.
Payment PMT-1 (15000.0) has no approval-authority reference; delegated authority is unverifiable.
Recorded decision DEC-1 (coverage) is not fully traceable — missing: rationale.
Open task 'Await police report from claimant' has been open 35d (> 30d) with no recorded resolution.

reviewer_considerations: Coverage/exclusion interpretation is the adjuster's call; findings only flag missing citations or period questions.
Reserve adequacy is an actuarial/adjuster judgement; findings only flag unsupported or divergent reserves.
Jurisdiction-specific rules (e.g., late-notice, fair-claims deadlines) may change how a finding is weighted.
A missing document may already exist outside the file; confirm before treating it as a gap.
recommended_handoffs: claims-fraud-referral-assistant (if fraud indicators are present; referral is draft-only)
disclaimer: Review findings and evidence only; not a coverage or reserve determination. No claim decision, payment, reserve change, or case closure has been made.
narrative: Review of claim CLM-2026-0442 (auto_collision, US-CA) as of 2026-07-20 assembled a chronology of 5 events and evaluated the documented review checks. Five findings are raised with cited evidence: two required documents (police_report, photos) are not in the file; payment PMT-1 (15,000.00) carries no approval-authority reference; recorded decision DEC-1 lacks a rationale; and an open task has aged past the stale threshold. Total incurred is 46,000.00 (Moderate). Deterministic review readiness: escalate, driven by the unverifiable payment authority. Every finding is decision-support for the adjuster to weigh against policy language and jurisdiction rules. Review findings and evidence only; not a coverage or reserve determination. No claim decision, payment, reserve change, or case closure has been made.
